description_long: This is a classic red fire extinguisher with a cylindrical metal body and a slightly domed top. It features a black discharge nozzle attached to a brass or gold-colored metal tube, which extends from the top of the cylinder. The top section includes a black handle and lever mechanism, likely made of metal with a painted or coated finish, and a visible safety pin. There is a large, rectangular label on the front of the cylinder, containing text and colored graphics, which provides usage instructions and safety information. The surface of the extinguisher appears slightly worn or textured, suggesting it has been used or exposed to the elements. The overall design is utilitarian and robust, suitable for emergency use in urban environments such as garages, sidewalks, or public buildings.
description: A red, cylindrical fire extinguisher with a black nozzle, brass tube, and a labeled front. It has a black handle and lever mechanism on top, with a visible safety pin.
description_view_0: The fire extinguisher is shown from a front-left angle, highlighting the black nozzle, brass tube, and the main label on the cylinder.
description_view_1: Viewed directly from the nozzle end, the extinguisher's cylindrical body is mostly obscured, with the black nozzle and handle aligned in the center.
description_view_2: The right side view displays the full length of the black nozzle and brass tube, with the label partially visible and the handle and lever mechanism clearly outlined.
description_view_3: The rear view shows the back of the cylinder and the full label, with the handle and lever mechanism visible from behind.
attribute_label_or_signage: A large, rectangular label with text and colored graphics is present on the front of the cylinder.
attribute_hose_or_nozzle: A black, conical nozzle is attached to a brass tube extending from the top of the cylinder.
attribute_safety_pin_or_seal: A metallic safety pin is visible at the top near the handle.
